prompt: A cinematic, photorealistic shot of a {argument name="character appearance" default="handsome young man with spiky dark brown hair and rectangular glasses"}, wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="black leather tactical jacket with a high collar, silver chest badge, and white arm stripes"} along with black leather gloves and an earpiece. He is {argument name="action" default="leaning intensely over a glowing tactical map on a table, pointing at it with his right hand"}. The scene takes place in a {argument name="setting" default="dimly lit, gritty concrete command bunker"}. In the blurred background, {argument name="background characters" default="several soldiers in full black tactical gear and helmets"} stand at attention. The shoulder of another person in a black uniform is visible in the foreground left, framing the shot. The image features dark, moody lighting, shallow depth of field, and high-resolution gritty textures.
translatedPrompt: 一张电影级、照片级逼真的镜头，主角是 {argument name="character appearance" default="一位留着深棕色刺猬头、戴着长方形眼镜的帅气年轻人"}，身穿 {argument name="outfit" default="带有高领、银色胸章和白色臂章的黑色皮质战术夹克"}，并佩戴黑色皮手套和耳机。他正 {argument name="action" default="身体前倾，专注地俯瞰着桌上发光的战术地图，右手指向地图"}。场景设定在 {argument name="setting" default="光线昏暗、充满粗粝感的混凝土指挥掩体"} 中。在模糊的背景中，{argument name="background characters" default="几名身穿全套黑色战术装备并佩戴头盔的士兵"} 肃立待命。画面左前景可见另一位身穿黑色制服的人的肩膀，构成了画面的框架。图像呈现出暗调、忧郁的灯光效果，具有浅景深和高分辨率的粗粝质感。

breakdown.creativeCore: 电影级战术指挥场景：生成一张照片级逼真、电影质感的图像，展示一名战术指挥官在粗粝的指挥中心内指向地图。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, cinematic]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: shallow depth, depth of field]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
